issues.description: Effect 1 is missing the DON!! cost condition. Card text requires 'rest 1 of your DON!! cards' as a cost/condition before the Rest action executes.
Effect 2 is missing the DON!! cost condition. Card text requires 'rest 2 of your DON!! cards' as a cost/condition before the Rest action executes.

Both effects Rest the wrong target. Card text says 'Set this Character as active', which means the character becomes active (typically unrest/flip from rested to active state), not Rest itself. The action should reflect setting the character to active state, not resting it.
